ecarx.carext.update.ota

Interface IOtaInstall


  • public interface IOtaInstall
    This class provides the API for managing ota install functionality.
    Since:
    5

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState
      Reason for inability to install
      IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_READY_FOR_INSTALLATION
      IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_CONNECTIVITY_NOK
      IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_GEARS_NOK
      IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_SPEED_NOK
      IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_SCENE_MODE_NOK: 场景模式不满足； IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_REASON_DEFAULT: 其他原因不满足；
      static interface  IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState
      FOTA power state
      IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_IDLE
      IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_UPGRADE
      IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_IMMEDIATE
      IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_DEFAULT
      static interface  IOtaInstall.RegretState
      Regret state

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int REGRET_SHOWING
      Regret showing
      static int REGRET_TERMINATE
      Regret terminate
      static int REGRET_TIMEOUT

      Request automatic upgrade switch status for OTA.

      Request automatic upgrade time for OTA.
      default boolean install()
      Install.
      default boolean registerAutoUpgradeListener(AutoUpgradeListener autoUpgradeListener)
      Set a listener to FWK.
      default boolean registerInstallListener(InstallListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain install event.
      default boolean registerScheduleListener(InstallScheduleListener listener)
      Register an observer to obtain schedule event.
      default boolean reinstall()
      Reinstall.
      default boolean requestScheduledTime()
      Request scheduled time.
      default boolean setAutoUpgradeStatus(boolean autoUpgrade, BaseCallBack<java.lang.Integer> callback)
      设置夜间自动更新开关 Set the automatic upgrade switch for OTA Update
      default boolean setAutoUpgradeStatus(boolean autoUpgrade, long timestamp)
      设置夜间自动更新开关并设置对应的时间 Set a time clock and a automatic upgrade switch for OTA Update 注意：由于 TCAM 只以预约时间作为实际安装时间，因此在使用此接口后需要再次调用setScheduledTime(long)
      default void setFlymeMobileUrlInfo(java.lang.String installationOrder, java.lang.String ecuAddress, java.lang.String downloadType, java.lang.String encryptionType, java.lang.String encryptionInfo, int fileSize, java.lang.String urlFlag, java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> urlList)
      Mobile phone assisted upgrade
      default boolean setPowerState(int state)
      设置电源状态 set the state of power
      default boolean setRegretState(int state)
      Set the state of the regret.
      default boolean setScheduledTime(long timestamp)
      设置预约安装时间 Set a time clock for OTA Update
      default void unregisterAutoUpgradeListener(AutoUpgradeListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.
      default void unregisterInstallListener(InstallListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.
      default void unregisterScheduleListener(InstallScheduleListener listener)
      Unregister the observer.

    • Method Detail

      • setRegretState

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean setRegretState(int state)
        Set the state of the regret.
        Since:
        5

      • install

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean install()
        Install.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful. The status will be notified later through the callback InstallListener.onStatusChanged(int, int).
        Since:
        5

      • reinstall

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean reinstall()
        Reinstall.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful. The status will be notified later through the callback InstallListener.onStatusChanged(int, int).
        Since:
        13

      • cancel

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean cancel()
        Cancel installation.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful. The status will be notified later through the callback InstallListener.onStatusChanged(int, int).
        Since:
        5

      • registerInstallListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean registerInstallListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                 InstallListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain install event.
        Since:
        5

      • unregisterInstallListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default void unregisterInstallListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                InstallListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Since:
        5

      • requestScheduledTime

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean requestScheduledTime()
        Request scheduled time.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful. The scheduled time will be notified later through the callback InstallScheduleListener.onTimeChanged(long, int).
        Since:
        5

      • setScheduledTime

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean setScheduledTime(long timestamp)
        设置预约安装时间 Set a time clock for OTA Update
        Parameters:
        timestamp - when the installation needs to perform in milliseconds since the epoch.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful. The cancel status will be notified later through the callback InstallScheduleListener.onTimeChanged(long, int).
        Since:
        5

      • setAutoUpgradeStatus

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean setAutoUpgradeStatus(boolean autoUpgrade,
                                                                                                              long timestamp)
        设置夜间自动更新开关并设置对应的时间 Set a time clock and a automatic upgrade switch for OTA Update 注意：由于 TCAM 只以预约时间作为实际安装时间，因此在使用此接口后需要再次调用setScheduledTime(long)
        Parameters:
        autoUpgrade - automatic upgrade switch.
        timestamp - when the installation needs to perform in milliseconds since the epoch.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful.
        Since:
        8

      • setAutoUpgradeStatus

        default boolean setAutoUpgradeStatus(boolean autoUpgrade,
                                     BaseCallBack<java.lang.Integer> callback)
        设置夜间自动更新开关 Set the automatic upgrade switch for OTA Update
        Parameters:
        autoUpgrade - automatic upgrade switch.
        callback - status callback from backend.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful.
        Since:
        14

      • getAutoUpgradeSwitch

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean getAutoUpgradeSwitch()
        Request automatic upgrade switch status for OTA.
        Returns:
        true if the switch is on. false if the switch is off.
        Since:
        8

      • getAutoUpgradeTime

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default long getAutoUpgradeTime()
        Request automatic upgrade time for OTA.
        Returns:
        the automatic upgrade time.
        Since:
        8

      • registerAutoUpgradeListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean registerAutoUpgradeListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                     AutoUpgradeListener autoUpgradeListener)
        Set a listener to FWK.
        Parameters:
        autoUpgradeListener - Listener.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful.
        Since:
        8

      • unregisterAutoUpgradeListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default void unregisterAutoUpgradeListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                    AutoUpgradeListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Since:
        8

      • cancelSchedule

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean cancelSchedule()
        Cancel installation schedule.
        Returns:
        whether this call was successful. The cancel status will be notified later through the callback InstallScheduleListener.onCanceled(int).
        Since:
        5

      • registerScheduleListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean registerScheduleListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                  InstallScheduleListener listener)
        Register an observer to obtain schedule event.
        Since:
        5

      • unregisterScheduleListener

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.ACCESS_OTA_INSTALL")
default void unregisterScheduleListener(@NonNull
                                                                                                                 InstallScheduleListener listener)
        Unregister the observer.
        Since:
        5

      • setFlymeMobileUrlInfo

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default void setFlymeMobileUrlInfo(java.lang.String installationOrder,
                                                                                                            java.lang.String ecuAddress,
                                                                                                            java.lang.String downloadType,
                                                                                                            java.lang.String encryptionType,
                                                                                                            java.lang.String encryptionInfo,
                                                                                                            int fileSize,
                                                                                                            java.lang.String urlFlag,
                                                                                                            java.util.ArrayList<java.lang.String> urlList)
        Mobile phone assisted upgrade
        Parameters:
        installationOrder - UUID
        ecuAddress - ecuAddress
        downloadType - downloadType
        encryptionType - encryptionType
        encryptionInfo - encryptionInfo
        fileSize - fileSize
        urlFlag - urlFlag
        urlList - urlList
        Since:
        9

      • setPowerState

        @RequiresPermission(value="ecarx.openapi.permission.MANAGE_OTA_INSTALL")
default boolean setPowerState(@IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState
                                                                                                       int state)
        设置电源状态 set the state of power
        Parameters:
        state - IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_IDLE IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_UPGRADE
        Returns:
        setting power state complete(设置电源状态是否完成)
        Since:
        10

      • couldBeginInstallRightNow

        int couldBeginInstallRightNow()
        检查现在是否可以立即开始升级. Check if ota could be started right now.
        Returns:
        更新条件状态值，取值参考如下： IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_READY_FOR_INSTALLATION: 可以开始升级状态； IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_CONNECTIVITY_NOK: 网络未连接状态； IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_GEARS_NOK: 挡位未在P档； IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_SPEED_NOK: 速度不满足； IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_SCENE_MODE_NOK: 场景模式不满足； IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_REASON_DEFAULT: 其他原因不满足；
